attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES_ALL)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.INVOICE_ID, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.PAYMENT_CROSS_RATE, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.PAYMENT_NUM, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.AMOUNT_REMAINING, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.DISCOUNT_DATE, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.DUE_DATE, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.FUTURE_PAY_DUE_DATE, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.GROSS_AMOUNT, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.HOLD_FLAG, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.PAYMENT_METHOD_LOOKUP_CODE, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.PAYMENT_PRIORITY, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.PAYMENT_STATUS_FLAG, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.SECOND_DISCOUNT_DATE, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.THIRD_DISCOUNT_DATE, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.BATCH_ID_R, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.DISCOUNT_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.SECOND_DISC_AMT_AVAILABLE, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.THIRD_DISC_AMT_AVAILABLE, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.DISCOUNT_AMOUNT_REMAINING, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.ORG_ID, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.EXTERNAL_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.INV_CURR_GROSS_AMOUNT, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.CHECKRUN_ID, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.DBI_EVENTS_COMPLETE_FLAG, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.IBY_HOLD_REASON, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.PAYMENT_METHOD_CODE, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.REMITTANCE_MESSAGE1, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.REMITTANCE_MESSAGE2, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.REMITTANCE_MESSAGE3, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.REMIT_TO_SUPPLIER_NAME, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.REMIT_TO_SUPPLIER_ID, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.REMIT_TO_SUPPLIER_SITE, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.REMIT_TO_SUPPLIER_SITE_ID, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.RELATIONSHIP_ID, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES,
 (
 select INVOICE_ID,PAYMENT_NUM,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES
 minus
 select INVOICE_ID,PAYMENT_NUM,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.INVOICE_ID = STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.INVOICE_ID and ACM.PAYMENT_NUM = STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.PAYMENT_NUM and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES.REFRESH_DATETIME
